title: Lower Enchanter's Shield - Ars Nouveau
description: Lowers the first person view of the Ars Nouveau Enchanter's Shield so that its less "in the way" & annoying. Looks the same when blocking so that you can tell its up.
body:
## Better visibility

Lowers the **Ars Nouveau Enchanter's Shield** in the first-person view model, so that it gets out of your way and you can actually see your screen. Does not affect the blocking model, so that you can tell that it's "up".

---

### 📸 Visual Comparison

> **Before:** Shield obstructs a quarter of your screen
> 
> ![The old viewmodel, much higher and takes up a quarter of the screen.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26f41edd32f94d157a7601fc4b8030d937b26862_0.webp)

> **After:** Shield remains visible but stays out of your way
> 
> ![The new viewmodel, shield still visable but out of your way](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f1f48fbcbf5279a76fd2b3d22e38b0502d57097_0.webp)

---
